overlay_feature_rows.reading: Measures whether core names still dominate branch rows or whether branch beta has started to overtake core quality.
Measures whether spillover activation is exceeding core-strength confirmation, a common late-maturity warning.
Tracks whether internal participation is shrinking from broad diffusion back to a narrow set of survivors.
Tracks whether turnover is concentrating into a smaller subset of names, often a congestion warning.
Tracks whether the leader still absorbs pressure cleanly or begins to show maturity-stage fragility.
Tracks whether branch names can sustain promotion from review support into credible extension or repeatedly fail.
Tracks whether more rows are being downgraded from core or extension roles into weaker maturity-stage behavior.
Tracks whether late-stage spillover activation has reached levels more consistent with maturity than with healthy diffusion.

family_rows.reading: These factors express internal crowding, maturity, and role-quality deterioration inside the CPO cohort. They can filter later portfolio decisions but do not replace role, phase, or catalyst truth.

interpretation: V1.12BO freezes the missing layer between market regime and stock-level truth: internal maturity, congestion, and role-quality deterioration inside the CPO cohort.
This layer is explicitly motivated by the BL failure: regime alone was necessary but insufficient.
